name: Fact Update Handling
description: Tests agent's ability to handle corrections — updating old facts with new ones.

noise_between_facts: I've been meaning to redecorate my apartment.
The weather has been unpredictable lately.

queries.question: What car do I drive now?

facts.content: My favorite color changed from blue to green after redecorating
facts.planted_as: You know, I've actually changed my mind about my favorite color. After redecorating the apartment with all these plants, I've really fallen in love with green. Blue feels so last year.

facts.content: I traded the Honda Civic for a Tesla Model 3
facts.planted_as: Big news — I finally traded in the Honda Civic for a Tesla Model 3 last week. The acceleration is insane and I'm saving a fortune on gas.

facts.content: I switched from Android to iPhone last month
facts.planted_as: Oh, I also switched from my Android to an iPhone last month. The ecosystem integration is way better for my workflow.

queries.question: What phone do I use now?
What's changed about my preferences and belongings recently? Walk me through the updates.
